mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM sales_order WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_order WHERE status = 'CREATED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales_order WHERE status = 'CREATED'
SELECT * FROM stock_flow ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DATE(created_at) as date, SUM(CASE WHEN change_amount > 0 THEN change_amount ELSE 0 END) as inbound, SUM(CASE WHEN change_amount < 0 THEN ABS(change_amount) ELSE 0 END) as outbound FROM stock_flow WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT DISTINCT item_id FROM stock_flow WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
SELECT i.category, SUM(si.qty) as value FROM sales_order_item si JOIN item i ON si.item_id = i.id GROUP BY i.category
SELECT i.category, SUM(si.subtotal) as value FROM sales_order_item si JOIN item i ON si.item_id = i.id GROUP BY i.category
